docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,275.00 FILED BY MONTIEL VILMA AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ BESSY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ BESSY
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-30-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-14-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $120.00 FILED BY HERNANDEZ BESSY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MONTIEL VILMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTIEL VILMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ BESSY $2,225.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,254.00, 60 CRESCENT,GARAGE STUDIO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MONTIEL VILMA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ BESSY
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 21666, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTIEL VILMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ BESSY $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, 60 CRESCENT GARAGE STUDIO BY STIP. TO BE PAID WITHIN 8 MONTHS AND NO LATER THAN 1/7/93. DEFT HERNANDEZ TO REMOVE POSS BY 5/23 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HERNANDEZ BESSY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MONTIEL VILMA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
